payload.summary: Wave 3 (F6) verified: 720 pass / 0 fail asserted directly, tsc clean. observe/distill/recall commands, segment-level distilled.json, compaction thresholds 200/30d. Reviewed deviations accepted: Phase 0 placeholder compaction_overdue_events retired for spec semantics (premise update, declared, old key rejected by schema); distill journals write-ahead outside mutate() with idempotent union (not id-keyed record). Observation schema gained optional name slug.
